query:
DELETE FROM hands 
WHERE (tagsJson IS NULL OR tagsJson = 'NULL')
  AND (lesson IS NULL OR lesson = 'NULL')
  AND reviewed = 0
  AND DATE(createdAt) IN ('2026-04-30', '2026-05-11')
  AND id != 1650016;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3SoCqzRfnhrz7B5.fc077db4ca74 --database BFa4yaxy9c4cDn5az6aTTB --execute DELETE FROM hands 
WHERE (tagsJson IS NULL OR tagsJson = 'NULL')
  AND (lesson IS NULL OR lesson = 'NULL')
  AND reviewed = 0
  AND DATE(createdAt) IN ('2026-04-30', '2026-05-11')
  AND id != 1650016;
